description: Sand-mold flask cutaway: riser-fed flanged-hub casting (heavy boss + thin web + end flange) freezing inward. Molten core glows, chill skin draws along mold walls, columnar dendrite fringe + inward arrows + equiaxed core fade in, then the last-to-freeze pocket pulses in the heavy boss under the riser with a ragged shrink void (ping) and centerline shrink trail. Pure foundry — no probes/film/beams; doubles as title panel.
